title: Contribution Margin Analysis: Calculate the contribution margin if total sales are 100000 and...
summary: Calculate or analyze the contribution margin for cost-volume-profit decision-making.
prompt: Calculate the contribution margin if total sales are $100,000 and total variable costs are $40,000.
solution: Contribution margin = Sales - Variable Costs = $100,000 - $40,000 = $60,000. This value is essential in assessing how much revenue is available to cover fixed costs and generate profit (Page 47).
